prompt: Freeze the suspicious payout workflow right now so nothing else moves until finance reviews it.
target_outcome: Redirect hard administrative freeze work to Hold Person rather than a sandbox design.
notes: Administrative freeze belongs to Hold Person.

prompt: Keep the service running, but mute just the webhook stream from the flaky partner until we finish debugging.
target_outcome: Redirect selective input muting to Blindness/Deafness instead of full containment.
notes: Selective sensory loss is not Forcecage.

prompt: Edit the CI config so only the staging deploy job changes image tags.
target_outcome: Redirect a surgical edit request to Mage Hand instead of building an isolation boundary.
notes: Simple file edits belong to Mage Hand.

prompt: Inspect the current sandbox logs and tell me whether the parser attempted any outbound connections.
target_outcome: Redirect read-only observation of containment telemetry to Detect Magic or Scrying rather than containment design itself.
notes: Reading the cage output is monitoring, not Forcecage.

prompt: Turn off only the CSV export endpoint for the next two hours while we investigate abuse reports.
target_outcome: Redirect targeted capability reduction to Eyebite rather than full containment.
notes: Selective capability shutdown belongs to Eyebite.
